code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_tokens(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let toks = string.split_whitespace(s)
  for t in toks
    match string.parse_int(t)
    when Some(n)
      result = list.push(result, n)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn read_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

fn add_unique(_ acc: List<Int>, _ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut out = acc
  for x in xs
    if not list.contains(out, x)
      out = list.push(out, x)
    end
  end
  out
end

fn get_at(_ xs: List<Int>, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match xs.get(i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn sort_asc(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  mut remaining = xs
  mut size = remaining.len()
  while size > 0
    mut min_idx = 0
    mut min_val = get_at(remaining, 0)
    mut k = 1
    while k < size
      let vk = get_at(remaining, k)
      if vk < min_val
        min_val = vk
        min_idx = k
      end
      k = k + 1
    end
    sorted = list.push(sorted, min_val)
    mut next_rem: List<Int> = []
    mut j = 0
    while j < size
      if j != min_idx
        next_rem = list.push(next_rem, get_at(remaining, j))
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    remaining = next_rem
    size = remaining.len()
  end
  sorted
end

fn render(_ xs: List<Int>) -> String
  mut out = ""
  let m = xs.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < m
    let v = get_at(xs, i)
    if i == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  out
end

let line1 = read_or_empty()
let line2 = read_or_empty()
let a = parse_tokens(line1)
let b = parse_tokens(line2)
let merged = add_unique(add_unique([], a), b)
let sorted = sort_asc(merged)
println(render(sorted))
